scripts.build: esbuild src/popup.ts src/service-worker.ts src/offscreen.ts src/audio-worklet.ts src/asr-worker.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=chrome116 --outdir=dist && cp public/manifest.json public/popup.html public/popup.css public/offscreen.html public/icon.png ../../THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md dist/ && cp ../../LICENSE dist/VOIVOX_LICENSE.txt && cp ../../node_modules/@huggingface/transformers/LICENSE dist/TRANSFORMERS_LICENSE.txt && cp ../../node_modules/@huggingface/jinja/LICENSE dist/JINJA_LICENSE.txt && cp ../../licenses/onnxruntime-MIT.txt dist/ONNXRUNTIME_LICENSE.txt && mkdir -p dist/wasm && cp ../../node_modules/@huggingface/transformers/dist/ort-wasm-simd-threaded.jsep.mjs ../../node_modules/@huggingface/transformers/dist/ort-wasm-simd-threaded.jsep.wasm dist/wasm/
scripts.package:zip: npm run build && mkdir -p release && rm -f release/VOIVOX-Chrome-Extension-0.1.0.zip && (cd dist && zip -qr ../release/VOIVOX-Chrome-Extension-0.1.0.zip .)
